instruction: turn on the falshlight of the android virtual machine in android studio

location.label: Flashlight toggle button in Android VM quick settings
location.name: Flashlight toggle button in Android VM quick settings
location.reasoning: The Android VM shows quick settings toggles. The Flashlight toggle is visible as the third pill button (currently in the off/dark state, unlike the active Internet and Bluetooth toggles above it). Clicking the center of this toggle pill will turn on the flashlight.
